title: Three aircrafts reported simultaneous UFO sightings in the State of São Paulo[1986]

text_preview:
## SEPT 21st, 1986. Time: 21:15. 

Three aircrafts [one military] reported UFO sightings in São Paulo.

FAB 2176 (SBRJ / SBSJ in FL 090). Duration: not determined. The pilot of the Brazilian Air Force FAB 2176 plane reported the sighting of an unidentified flying object at 12-hours in relation to his aircraft. According to the witness, the UFO was “similar to Venus when this planet is at its brightest. Yellowish in color. It said, however, that it was not Venus. The UFO was round, yellow and was apparently stationary. According to the pilot’s report, “in the first sighting, the object was 6° f
summary: On Sep 21, 1986, a FAB military aircraft and two civilian flights simultaneously reported large UFOs over São Paulo state, one estimated ~45m wide by TF 406 pilot.
